title: CarPlan 101568666 CarPlan Bluestar Ready Mixed Antifreeze 1L
features: VERSATILE ENGINE PROTECTION: CarPlan Blue Star Ready Mixed Antifreeze & Summer Coolant is formulated with mono-ethylene glycol, making it suitable for all engine types. Experience exceptional year-round protection and performance in various driving conditions.

LONG-LASTING CORROSION INHIBITION: With built-in corrosion inhibitors, this antifreeze can be left in the system as a coolant and inhibitor against rust for up to 2 years. Enjoy peace of mind knowing your engine is protected against corrosion for an extended period.

EASY-TO-FOLLOW APPLICATION: Follow simple directions for use, ensuring optimal performance. Top up your system as needed, referencing your vehicle manufacturer's handbook for recommended levels. This antifreeze provides hassle-free maintenance and reliability for your engine.

CONFORMS TO BRITISH STANDARDS: Our Blue Star Ready Mixed Antifreeze is blended from anti-freeze concentrate that adheres to the stringent British Standard BS 6580 (1992). This ensures a high-quality product that meets industry standards for antifreeze performance.
BITTERING AGENT ADDED FOR SAFETY: CarPlan Blue Star Antifreeze & Coolant incorporates a bittering agent, discouraging unintended ingestion and enhancing safety measures for users.
description: Carplan Blue Star Ready Mixed Antifreeze is a liquid coolant based on mono-ethylene glycol and containing corrosion inhibitors designed to give corrosion protection to metals commonly found in cooling systems, as well as providing the engine with protection from freezing. It is premixed with de-ionized water for customers who want the ultimate in convenience and protection. For your safety, there is an added bittering agent in this product to help prevent accidental swallowing and consequent harmful effects. ADVANTAGES Excellent corrosion protection Premixed with de-ionized water to provide freeze protection down to -17°C Elevated Boiling Point (approx. 1005°C at atmospheric pressure) Mixed fleet protection - one coolant for cars, vans and trucks (petrol and diesel) Protects all types of engines Maintenance free - low additive depletion Excellent compatibility with seals, hoses and plastic components Helps prevent winter freezing and summer boil over Blended from Blue Star concentrate which meets the quality standards of BS 6580 : 1992 APPLICATION Drain and flush the cooling system with cleanwater. Use a CarPlan cooling system preparation if sludge is evident. Check all hose clips and joints for leakage tighten where necessary. Fill radiator with Ready Mix Antifreeze to give level of protection required. Replace radiator cap, run engine for a few minutes to circulate antifreeze around the system. Remove radiator cap and top up the radiator with Ready Mix Antifreeze if necessary.
